title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell discusses the evolution of software engineering toward autonomous agent-driven development. Cursor reports that 30% of its pull requests are fully agent-generated end-to-end, enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in a year, and engineers are shifting toward agent management roles.
